Domestic Box Office $31,418,697Details

DVD Sales (estimated) $12,712,692

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 1st, 2008 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: June 3rd, 2008 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence/terror and disturbing content
Running Time: 97 minutes
